seo.title: About us — since 2003 in the Ardennes | ArdenNest
seo.description: ArdenNest (formerly Ferme du Château Gedinne and Le Bon Voisin) — holiday home for 26 guests in the Ardennes, personally run by Bieke and Christophe.

title: About Us
h1: Bieke and Christophe — personal hosts in the Ardennes for 22 years
subtitle: The people behind ArdenNest

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
You may know us as Ferme du Château Gedinne or Le Bon Voisin — our former names, back when we were still figuring out what we wanted to be (large holiday rental and B&B, both at the same time). Since then, we made the choice: one house, one clear story.

Anyone who stays here feels at home, as in a nest. Young and old alike. That's why ArdenNest: your nest in the Ardennes.

philosophy.title: Festina Lente
philosophy.subtitle: Make haste slowly
philosophy.content: This Latin wisdom forms the core of our philosophy. At ArdenNest, everything revolves around slowing down, enjoying and truly being together.

owners.title: Bieke & Christophe
owners.description: Bieke and Christophe live on the property and personally welcome every group. No anonymous key handover, but a warm welcome with tips about the area and the house.
owners.onSite: Present on the property and available for guests throughout your entire stay.

cleaning.title: Housekeeping Team
cleaning.description: Ensures everything is spotless for your arrival

garden.title: Garden Maintenance
garden.description: Keeps the 2 hectares of garden in perfect condition

whyRelationship.title: Why the relationship matters
whyRelationship.content: On an OTA, you're a booking. With us, you're a guest. We know the house like no one else and are ready to make your stay as pleasant as possible.
